title: Get a hold of the column type icons?

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, would love to be able to use them in my board view.

Would be great if they could be included in the design system icons.

Any other way of getting them in the meantime before Sunday’s contest deadline?

Thanks,
Ronen

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff,

Let me check in with the team on this and see what we can do.

-Daniel
